CustomField.formula: if(NATT_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c="NATT_End_Customer",Case ( Text(NATT_Account_Contact_Role__c), 'President' , 'Management', 'Vice-President', 'Management', 'General Manager', 'Management', 'Account Manager', 'Sales', 'Billing Admin', 'Sales', 'Shipping', 'Service', 'Service Manager', 'Service', 'Parts Manager', 'Parts', 'Warranty Manager', 'Service', 'Gerente de Compras', 'NA', 'Other', 'Sales', 'Purchasing Manager', 'Sales','NA'), if(RecordType.DeveloperName="NATT_Dealer",Case ( Text(NATT_Key_Business_Role__c), 'Principal', 'Management', 'Co-Principal', 'Management', 'VP/Director','Management', 'VP/Director - Sales','Management', 'VP/Director - Parts', 'Management', 'VP/Director - Service', 'Management', 'VP/Director – Parts & Service', 'Management', 'General Manager','Management', 'Branch Manager','Sales', 'Sales Manager','Sales', 'Service Manager','Service', 'Parts Manager','Parts', 'Warranty Manager','Service', 'Office Manager','Sales', 'Unit Sales Person','Sales', 'Parts Sales Person','Parts', 'Technician','Service', 'Warranty Admin','Service', 'Billing Admin','Sales', 'General Admin','Sales', 'Corporate Officer','Management', 'Director General', 'Management', 'Subdirector', 'Management','NA'),'NA'))
CustomField.label: NPS Escalation
